'''Juloff''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] reporter who worked for the [[Galactic News Network]] at the [[Indu GNN bureau]] on [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]].<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />

When [[Kella Rand]] discovered evidence that would incriminate [[Kaleb Darme]] in the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of [[Shek Barayel]] and attempted framing of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Juloff turned on Rand and notified Darme. He further proved his sympathy to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by taking several potshots at Rand with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. When Rand escaped and made it to [[Dictio L'varren]]'s hotel, Juloff pointed out Rand to Darme, who captured her before she could make it to [[Suite 44-1]].<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />
